title: Mobile Suit Gundam III: Encounters in Space
original_title: 機動戦士ガンダム III めぐりあい宇宙編
overview: Amuro Ray and the rest of the White Base crew, now denominated the 13th Autonomous Corps, return to outer space to support the rest of the Earth Federation forces for the decisive battle against the Principality of Zeon's forces.
